sections.paragraph:
I. ἄπειρος, ον pert. to lack of knowledge or capacity to do someth., unacquainted with, unaccustomed to (‘lacking the ability to make trial [s. πεῖρα] of’; Pind., Hdt., et al.; Epict. 2, 24, 3; OGI 669, 11; pap e.g. PSI 522, 4 [also s. Preis.]; LXX; Philo, Agr. 160 [a beginner is ἄ.], Op. M. 171; Jos., Bell. 6, 291; Iren. 1, 8, 1 [Harv. I 68, 5]), of an immature Christian ἄ. λόγου δικαιοσύνης unacquainted w. the teaching about uprightness Hb 5:13 (the gen. as freq., e.g. PGiss 68, 17 ἄ. τῶν τόπων; Jos., Ant. 7, 336; Ath. 27, 1).—DELG s.v. πεῖρα. M-M. TW.

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

someth. someth. = something

Pind Pind , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et et al. = et alii (and others)

Epict Epict , various works, I–II a.d.—List 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

e.g. e.g. = exempli gratia (for example)

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

Preis. Preis. = FPreisigke, Wörterbuch der griech. Papyrusurkunden—Lists 4, 6

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Agr Agr = Agraphon (non-canonical sayings of Jesus)—List 1

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Iren. Iren. = Irenaeus, Haereses, II a.d.—List 5

Harv. Harv. = WHarvey; s. Iren.—List 5

gen. gen. = genitive

freq. freq. = frequent(ly)

PGiss PGiss = Griechische Papyri . . . zu Giessen—List 4

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 100
